## If you touched a persona or the workflow
- [ ] Ran a real council session on at least one decision
- [ ] Advisors still diverge (no softening toward consensus)
- [ ] Independence invariant preserved (advisors only see anonymized debate rounds)

## Checklist
- [ ] Change is focused and the diff is minimal
- [ ] README / SKILL.md updated if behavior changed
